title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.265 - Rules and procedures, developed by whom, published, where
text:
208.265.  Rules and procedures, developed by whom, published, where. — The director shall develop specific procedures and rules for the program for inclusion in the Missouri Register.  These rules shall be subject to all state laws regarding the development of such rules.
(L. 1976 S.B. 875 § 4)
